summary: Iteration 51 - Customer PWA and Order History Testing Complete. All features working correctly: /menu page displays restaurants, /menu/{tenant_id} shows branches and menu, manifest-customer.json has correct start_url=/menu and scope=/menu, order history API filters by phone number correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/customer/restaurants returns list of restaurants - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/menu/demo-maestro returns menu with categories and products - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/orders/history with phone=07701234567 returns 1 order - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/orders/history with non-existent phone returns empty array - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/orders/history without phone returns empty array - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials works - PASSED
Frontend: /menu page loads and displays 'اطلب طعامك' header - PASSED
Frontend: /menu page shows 'Full Flow Test Restaurant' with 4 branches - PASSED
Frontend: /menu/demo-maestro shows branch selection with 2 branches (Aljadreia, Alsaydaia) - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting branch shows menu with categories (المشروبات, الوجبات الرئيسية, المقبلات, الحلويات) - PASSED
Frontend: Products displayed (قهوة عربية 3,500 د.ع, شاي 2,500 د.ع) - PASSED
Frontend: Add to cart button works - toast shows 'تمت الإضافة للسلة' - PASSED
Frontend: Cart button shows item count and total - PASSED
Frontend: Cart page shows items with quantity controls - PASSED
Frontend: Login page loads correctly with email/password fields - PASSED
Frontend: Login with demo@maestroegp.com/demo123 redirects to dashboard - PASSED
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_customer_pwa_iter51.py - Created new test file for customer PWA features
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer PWA flow is fully working: /menu → select restaurant → select branch → view menu → add to cart → checkout. manifest-customer.json correctly configured with start_url=/menu and scope=/menu. Order history API at /api/customer/orders/history filters orders by phone number. Test phone 07701234567 has 1 order in history.
